author: terencechain
content: we have an open PR for this

author: kenny_007_
content:
But I think even with this PR, the problem remains, 
1. As Potuz mentioned, envelope HTR needs to be carried in attestations for this. So, in commit(https://github.com/OffchainLabs/prysm/commit/b141b5ccd241c90e9da9c8f67e362d0ce61d3f2d), the `validateGloasCommitteeIndex` function needs to use `hasBadPayload`(envelopeHTR) cannot be used without a spec change. 
2. The other thing I noticed is with/without the HTR key PR,  the existing merged commit(https://github.com/OffchainLabs/prysm/commit/b141b5ccd241c90e9da9c8f67e362d0ce61d3f2d) using root key for `badPayloadCache`, not only will it reject (honest attester + bad envelope seen + good envelope not seen), but also right after this (honest attester + bad envelope seen earlier + good envelope seen at the time of attestation)  because then both the `badPayloadCache` is not getting cleared in 2nd case but also, the `hasBadPayload` is not kept inside a `HasFullNode`( or after `HasFullNode` check). So it will again fire `ValidationReject` . correct me if i am wrong

author: terencechain
content: ya i understand, satushh and i have been talking internally to address them. Just not super high in terms of priority yet 🙂

author: potuz
content: still the spec needst to be fixed if it says to reject here
